title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾为象征，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
summary: 一个由AI代理管理的博物馆展品，使用Rust语言和Gajae-Code / LazyCodex构建，完全无需人工干预开发和维护。
highlights: An agent-managed museum exhibit
built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用人工智能，提供工具以便用户专注于重要事务。

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.1、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: Anomalyco/OpenCode 是一个开源编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助功能。

title: German ruling declares Google liable for false answers in AI Overviews
content: Article URL: https://the-decoder.com/landmark-german-ruling-declares-googles-ai-overviews-are-googles-own-words-and-makes-it-liable-for-false-answers/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48470248 Points: 982 # Comments: 524
summary: 德国法院裁定谷歌对其AI概览中的虚假回答负有责任，认为这些内容属于谷歌自身言论，而非第三方内容，因此谷歌需承担法律责任。
highlights: German ruling declares Google liable for false answers in AI Overviews
landmark German ruling declares Google's AI Overviews are Google's own words
makes it liable for false answers

title: To Gen or Not To Gen: The Ethical Use of Generative AI
summary: 文章探讨生成式AI的伦理使用，提出在特定场景下应谨慎选择是否使用生成式AI，并强调透明度和责任的重要性。
highlights: To Gen or Not To Gen: The Ethical Use of Generative AI
Comments

title: It doesn’t matter if it works
summary: 文章标题为'It doesn’t matter if it works'，强调在软件开发中，代码是否工作并非唯一重要因素，可能更关注代码质量、可维护性等。
highlights: It doesn’t matter if it works
Comments

title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
content: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.
summary: 天体物理学家Chi-kwan Chan利用OpenAI的Codex工具构建黑洞模拟，帮助科学家研究极端物理现象并检验爱因斯坦的广义相对论。
highlights: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations
helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity

title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
content: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
summary: OpenAI 支持欧盟关于AI内容透明度的实践准则，推动溯源标准与工具，帮助人们理解AI生成内容。
highlights: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency
advancing provenance standards and tools
help people understand AI-generated content

title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP
summary: 本文是PyTorch性能分析系列的第二部分，重点介绍如何通过分析nn.Linear层来优化MLP（多层感知器）模型，并探讨了融合操作（fused MLP）的实现与性能提升。
highlights: 从nn.Linear到Fused MLP的性能优化路径
详细分析PyTorch中线性层的性能瓶颈
融合操作如何减少内核启动和内存访问开销

title: Can Voice Agents Handle Bilingual Customers? Benchmarking Frontier ASR on Code-Switched Speech
summary: 该博客评估了前沿自动语音识别（ASR）系统在代码切换语音上的表现，即双语用户在对话中混合使用两种语言的现象。作者对多种ASR模型进行了基准测试，分析了它们在处理代码切换时的准确性和鲁棒性，并讨论了语音代理在服务双语客户时面临的挑战。
highlights: Can Voice Agents Handle Bilingual Customers?
Benchmarking Frontier ASR on Code-Switched Speech
评估了前沿ASR系统在代码切换语音上的表现
